/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTWM/ACM/X:AS A CONDITIONOF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ONTHE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1:CORNEL LETRICE BUCKNER/SA2:1263 GILMAN ST, SF CA/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/X:BOX '16B' IS CHECKED/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/
